svg.text: Hierarchical Control Architecture for Intralogistics Robotics

text.tspan: Fleet-scale behavior emerges from coupled feedback between estimation, coordination,

svg.text: Orders, task arrivals, layout constraints, safety rules, operating conditions
Robot localization, traffic state, queue state, resource availability, blockage detection
Task allocation, route planning, resource scheduling, reservation logic, conflict resolution
Coupled control inputs: u_alloc, u_plan, u_sched
Fleet motion, pickup and drop-off, charging, docking, throughput, latency, congestion, energy, safety
